summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) documenting Cycle 2 Day 1 visit data for patient VEL209-ES02-004 at site ES-02 in study BIORCE-NEU-2022-004. The form captures vital signs, study drug dispensing and compliance (400mg tablets), cognitive assessments (MMSE), falls assessment, adverse events (headache and dizziness), and study partner observations, verified by investigator Dr. I. Fernandez on 28 October 2022.
